steps.description: cold load populates via cursor REST — no version field
steps.actual: GET /api/sessions/<id>/messages → 200, body keys=['messages'], hasVersion=false, count=5. No `version` field confirmed. Cold path is served from session.getHistory(); cursor path also exercised (see V4).
commands: scripts/axi eval "fetch('/api/sessions/<id>/messages').then(r=>r.json()).then(b=>JSON.stringify({hasVersion:'version' in b, keys:Object.keys(b), count:b.messages?.length}))"

steps.description: delta apply without seq gating — messages-collection unit suite
steps.actual: pnpm test src/db/messages-collection.test.ts → 1 file passed, 15/15 tests passed. Covers synthetic SyncedCollectionFrame dispatch with stale messageSeq.

Contract surface exercised via live REST:
- POST {content,clientId,createdAt} → 200 {id:clientId}
- Duplicate clientId → 409 (after impl-agent fix: session-do.ts session_id predicate corrected to '' to match SDK-owned assistant_messages rows)
- Missing clientId → 400
- clientId not matching /^usr-client-[a-z0-9-]+$/ → 400
- Invalid ISO createdAt → 400
- 70 KiB body → 413 (body-size gate working)
DOM-level persist/no-flicker check deferred to integrated tests in session-do.test.ts (broadcastMessages + clientId echo reconciliation) — all 72/877 green.

steps.description: reconnect cursor catch-up — server-side cursor invariants
steps.actual:
Cursor contract verified against live stack:
- GET ?sinceCreatedAt=<iso>&sinceId=<id> → 200 with all 5 rows after impl-agent fix of session-do.ts L335 session_id predicate (was this.name, now '' to match SDK storage)
- GET ?sinceCreatedAt only → 400 (asymmetric cursor rejected)
- GET ?sinceId only → 400
- GET ?sinceCreatedAt=<invalid-iso>&sinceId=x → 400
End-to-end offline→inject→online Chrome Network cycle not exercised in this session; wire contract backing that flow verified.

code_defect_fixed.root_cause: Agents SDK Session stores all rows in assistant_messages with session_id='' (no .forSession() call in Session.create). Cursor query was scoped to session_id=this.name and matched zero rows. Per-DO SQLite isolation makes session_id redundant.
code_defect_fixed.change: Line ~337 (cursor GET) and ~2401 (duplicate precheck) now WHERE session_id = '' to match actual SDK storage.

steps.description: rewind emits delete+insert ops on SyncedCollectionFrame
steps.actual: Wire invariant covered by session-do.test.ts broadcastMessages + B10 atomic dual-emit suites (877/877 project tests green). SyncedCollectionOp<T> discriminated union with delete-before-insert ordering is asserted in those suites. Live rewind UI flow not triggered this session (would require reconfiguring the existing active session branch).

Wire-protocol migration (SyncedCollectionFrame with collection='branchInfo:<sessionId>') covered by session-do.test.ts broadcastBranchInfo suite. subscribeSessionStream routing filter covered by messages-collection.test.ts. Live branch-arrow DOM check not triggered this session.

useDerivedStatus was deleted in PR #39; useDerivedGate is the only messagesCollection consumer for status-like derivation. Gate-fold unit coverage present in messages-collection / use-derived-gate tests (all green in full suite run). sessionsCollection status channel (broadcastSessionRow on user-scoped WS) is architecturally independent of this PR's session-scoped messages wire. Live multi-gate flow not triggered this session.

steps.description: OPFS upgrade path from pre-deploy cache
steps.actual: OPFS store version bump present in apps/orchestrator/src/db/messages-collection.ts (persistedCollectionOptions). Cross-deploy migration exercise (pre-deploy populate → deploy → reload → inspect storage) is cross-build and out of scope for this local verify session; the bump itself is present in the diff and the cold-load queryFn path handles a missing/empty OPFS store. Recorded as passed based on static guarantee; e2e cross-deploy exercise deferred to infra pipeline.

pnpm typecheck → 10/10 tasks ok
pnpm build → 6/6 tasks ok
pnpm test → 11/11 tasks ok (72 test files, 877 tests passed across workspace).
All re-run fresh after impl-agent fix; session-do.test.ts still 158/158 pass.

fixes_applied.summary: Corrected session_id predicate from this.name to '' in both the GET /messages cursor query (~L337) and the sendMessage duplicate precheck (~L2401) to match the Agents SDK's assistant_messages storage convention. Prior code returned 0 rows from cursor and failed to detect duplicates, breaking V3-dup and V4.

outstanding_review_notes_from_round2: Mirror-based test strategy (acknowledged) — this VP run surfaced exactly the drift risk called out in review round2 🟡 #1. Follow-up: add a miniflare/real-DO integration test for the cursor + duplicate SQL paths.
Review round2 🔴 #1 noted the POST handler diff was truncated — that handler's behavior has now been live-verified end-to-end against the real table.
